http.400: Incorrect request. Please check your input and try again.
http.401: Unauthorised. Please log in to continue.
http.403: Forbidden. You don't have permission to access this resource.
http.404: Page not found. The requested resource could not be found.
http.409: Conflict. The request could not be completed due to a conflict.
http.429: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
http.500: Internal server error. Please try again later.
http.502: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
http.503: Service unavailable. We're working on fixing this issue.

auth.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please check your credentials and try again.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
auth.notVerified: Your account has not been verified. Please check your email for a verification link.
auth.loginRequired: You must be logged in to continue.
auth.accountLocked: Your account has been locked due to too many failed attempts. Please contact support.
auth.accountDisabled: Your account has been disabled. Please contact support.

member.notFound: Member not found. Please check the details and try again.
member.alreadyExists: A member with these details already exists.
member.insufficientPoints: You don't have enough points for this reward.
member.rewardExpired: This reward has expired and is no longer available.
member.rewardAlreadyRedeemed: You have already redeemed this reward.
member.tierDowngraded: Your tier has been downgraded. Continue earning points to maintain your status.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number.
validation.minLength: This field must be at least {{min}} characters.
validation.maxLength: This field must not exceed {{max}} characters.
validation.weakPassword: Password must contain at least 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, number and special character.
